title: Miskolc, Borsod-Abaúj-Zemplén — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Miskolc, Borsod-Abaúj-Zemplén: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Miskolc is a city in Borsod-Abaúj-Zemplén with a population of 154,521. Hungary’s fourth-largest city, a former industrial center transformed with thermal baths, the stunning Lillafüred Palace Hotel, and the Bükk Mountains nearby.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
